I'll close this ticket now, so that you're not bugged by a pending request. To chat further about this case, replying here within 24-hours will re-open this ticket, and anytime after that will create a new follow-up ticket. You may also feel free to call or text Edge support at +1(619)777-5688 for any other questions or concerns you may have in the future.

 

Best regards,
